action.reasoning: Observation: ridge_W_tv achieved new best 0.4637 (vs 0.4648 train-only). Analysis: Adding val data helps slightly. Let me try: (1) explore higher lambda values, (2) try DLinear-style decomposition + ridge. Also could try using full sequence (not subtracting last value) with ridge. The simplest next step is to scan more lambdas around 1000 (try 5000, 10000, 100000) since val_mse was still decreasing with lambda. Decision: Scan more lambdas + try without subtracting last value (RevIN-style with mean subtraction over window).
